title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team processed 6 reports today. Here is a summary of outcomes:

BANS (2):
- spam_wave_42: Banned for high-severity spam. Posted phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner: Banned for high-severity harassment. Engaged in repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

WARNINGS (2):
- new_member_17: Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions.
- bot_like_user_77: Warned for suspicious automation behavior (repeated near-identical replies in help channels).

NO ACTION (2):
- report_003 (trusted_helper): Closed without sanction. Report arose from a single-user moderation disagreement; trusted community role; insufficient basis for action.
- report_006 (core_maintainer): Closed without sanction. Identified as a false positive generated by a brigading campaign following a moderation decision.

All 6 reports have been closed. The moderation team remains committed to fair, evidence-based enforcement that protects all community members.
